title: Tooling and Die Center
entry_mechanism: NIDLP-KAEC automotive cluster development with international partner
executive_summary:
Automotive tooling — injection moulds, press dies, jigs, and fixtures — is the capital equipment backbone of automotive manufacturing. Saudi Arabia's automotive programme requires in-Kingdom tooling capability to service its growing component manufacturing base without depending on costly foreign tooling suppliers. Node AU-7 targets a Saudi automotive tooling centre capable of designing and manufacturing moulds and dies for Saudi component manufacturers.

The global automotive tooling and die center market is growing in line with the overall automotive industry. Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 automotive programme creates immediate domestic demand anchored by Saudi OEM assembly and the 10M+ vehicle installed base.
